text: My jaw has been aching a bit this morning and my arm feels kind of heavy. I also feel a little sweaty, maybe it's the weather.
I'm just really tired and my back hurts between my shoulder blades, plus a little heartburn that won't go away. Just generally feel off.
My husband hit his head a few hours ago, he said he was fine but now he's sleeping on the couch and I can't really wake him up properly. He just mumbles.
I have a cough but now when I try to talk to you I just can't finish the sentence without stopping to catch my breath.
I am bleeding profusely! I got a paper cut and there is blood everywhere, it looks like a murder scene but it stopped when I held a tissue on it for a minute.
My chest hurts so much, it's a sharp stabbing pain right in the middle every single time I take a deep breath or twist my body. It goes away when I hold my breath.
I have a terrifying looking bruise, it's dark purple and black and huge, after I bumped my leg on the coffee table. It doesn't hurt to walk though.
I'm coughing up so much phlegm, my nose is completely blocked and my head is pounding. I feel like I'm dying from this cold.
I am having severe crushing chest pain radiating to my left arm, I am sweating a lot and I threw up twice.
I slipped on the ice and my ankle is very swollen and turning purple. I cannot walk on it at all.
I have had a fever of 102 for three days and my lower right stomach really hurts when I press on it.
I have a mild headache and a runny nose that started two days ago.
I scraped my knee on the sidewalk when I tripped. It stings a bit but I washed it out.
